statement: The forced publicly checkable source authorization kernel retains message support; signing relation; verification relation; key identities; accepted signatures; forgery adversary support; correctness trace; every operation is source-bound, trace-complete, boundary-explicit, composition-preserving, successor-general and contains no imported answer-producing premise.
title: Fold signature law
